approvalStep.label: Approval Request goes to Joaan Heck
approvalStep.name: Approval_Request_goes_to_Joaan_Heck

ApprovalProcess.description: This is approval process for approval of CDI or friend request. This is a 1 level approval process for some requests based on criteria.

entryCriteria.formula: TEXT(NAFTA_RequestStatus__c) = 'Submitted' && (CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T9995J4' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T6277T0' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T7930ER' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T2041BK' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T8655DP' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T7857KM' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T1245RG' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T3274J0' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T1779MM' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T0933SS' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T3976RK' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T5631MA' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T0997TK' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T5467EW' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T8540MF' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T0188T1' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T5854CE' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T4127NI' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T7371RS' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T3085GJ' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T5349RC' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T1416MM' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T0539J0' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T4893CO' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T8731CI' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T0130DL' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T1286TV' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T4880PH' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T1655TN' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T1835RC' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T5295EJ' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T5333GB' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T6494MW' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T7767TZ' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T2209OR' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T4503SM' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T5139AM' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T4012KT' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T7368C1' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T5471PK' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T2065JG' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T0555WE' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T7048AD' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T7804D1' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T3718RL' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T3569MD' || CreatedBy.FederationIdentifier= 'T6684WF')

ApprovalProcess.label: Single Level Apprvl Of CDI and FR
